settings.title: Master The Scene
settings.description:
CONSPIT brings together the elite forces of professional drivers and a top-tier racing engineering team, leveraging our comprehensive Motorsport expertise to create its first Direct Drive product. 

The Ares series wheelbases, including ARES 12 and ARES 20 Platinum, demonstrate exceptional performance and clear competitive features across multiple dimensions.

settings.title: Superior Performance
settings.description:
Designed for sim racers seeking the ultimate competitive experience, the Ares features a 23-bit high-resolution optical encoder and a high-precision skew-pole direct-drive motor, specifically developed for sim racing. 

Paired with an optimized, high-performance force feedback system, it delivers an unmatched, ultra-smooth driving experience.

settings.title: 23-bit Optical Encoder
settings.description:
The Ares series is equipped with a high-precision optical encoder, featuring an angular resolution of less than 0.01° and a 23-bit resolution. It delivers significantly higher accuracy and stability compared to commonly used magnetic encoders on the market. 

Unlike magnetic systems, the optical encoder effectively eliminates consistency and coaxiality errors, resulting in smoother, more refined force feedback and a greatly enhanced driving experience.

settings.title: The Comparison - Optical vs. Magnetic
settings.description:
The optical encoder used in Ares Wheelbase demonstrates superior performance 
compared to magnetic encoders with identical resolution.

settings.title: Specialized for the Task
settings.description:
Unlike the standard off-the-shelf industrial servo motors used by others, the Ares 
features a proprietary-engineered motor structure specifically designed to meet the 
unique demands of a racing simulator, optimizing handling feel, steering feedback, and stability, delivering:

• Lightning-fast torque response
• Minimal torque cogging (less than 2.3%) 
• Ultra-smooth handling 
• Precise steering input

settings.title: Advanced Thermal Management
settings.description: Real-time, high-frequency monitoring of the system's temperature ensures stable motor and control system operation, delivering exceptional thermal management performance.

settings.title: Precision Calibration and Optimization
settings.description: In addition to providing precise calibration of torque parameters, The Testing also offers a reliable tool for objectively quantifying base feel adjustments. Characteristics like torque dynamic range, responsiveness, and high-frequency noise, which heavily influence the feel, can be evaluated and optimized.

settings.title: Innovative Industrial Design
settings.description: With a sleek, compact profile and a visually lightweight design, the ARES offers a multi-angle aesthetic experience that exceeds both visual and performance expectations.

settings.title: POGO Module for Future Expansion
settings.description: The front of the base is equipped with magnetic contacts for easy installation and future expansion of various functional components.

settings.title: High Safety Design
settings.description: A dedicated safety mode ensures driver protection and allows children to play safely under parental supervision.

settings.title: Conspit Link 2.0
settings.description:
Easily configure wheelbase functions, fine-tune FFB, monitor status, and create custom presets using Conspit Link 2.0 software.

Featuring official presets crafted by professional drivers and vehicle dynamics engineers, allowing for quick switching between games or vehicle setups, including presets from renowned pro drivers like Laurin Heinrich.

settings.title: CDP Quick Release System
settings.description: The Ares wheelbase features the CDP QR System, a Formula-inspired CNC-machined 7075 aluminum clasp and ball-locking mechanism for precise torque transmission and positioning. Spring contacts ensure EMI-resistant stability, while optimized geometry prevents wear, delivering zero-play durability under high loads.
